code_blocks.code:
dataset = xdr_data
| filter event_type = ENUM.AUTH and action_auth_result = "FAIL"
| filter _time >= ago(24h)
| comp count() as failed_attempts by actor_user, action_remote_ip
| filter failed_attempts > 5
| sort desc failed_attempts

scenario:
A security analyst notices an increase in authentication alerts within a Cortex XDR and XSIAM environment. To determine whether this is normal user behaviour or a possible brute-force attack, the analyst runs an XQL query to identify repeated failed login attempts coming from the same IP address.

The query searches authentication logs from the past 24 hours and highlights accounts with more than five failed sign-in attempts from a single remote IP.
snippet: Identify repeated failed login attempts from the same IP address during the past 24 hours.
